How it works · 4 minute read

Turn $12 into a story worth telling

Transparent sweepstakes. Real winners.

Pick a prize, pre-order a ticket, watch every draw live on YouTube, and get paid within 48 hours if your name is called.

Turn $12 into a story worth telling

How it works

Three steps.
That's the whole thing.

Pick a prize, enter from $12, watch the draw live. Prizes paid within 48 hours.

Browse sweepstakes →

01 · PICK

Pick a prize you'd actually take.

Diving, Vegas, tech, cruises, every prize is verified and photographed before it goes live.

02 · ENTER

One entry from $12. Or free by mail.

Pay with card or Apple Pay. Your entry number is issued the moment payment clears.

03 · DRAW

Drawn live. Paid in 48 hours.

Random draws stream every Sunday at 8pm ET. If your name is called, we wire the prize or cash equivalent within two business days.

So, ready to dive in?

Pre-sale open · Four sweepstakes · First draw July 5, 8pm ET
